top_signals.title: Brent Crude Falls Below $90 a Barrel as China Slashes Imports
top_signals.summary: Brent crude oil, the global benchmark, dipped to its lowest level since April on growing signs that demand is plunging to counter supply losses from the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasuries Advance Before Auction as Oil Prices Retreat Further
top_signals.summary: Treasuries rose as benchmark oil prices declined to the lowest levels in more than a month, alleviating concern about elevated inflation ahead of Wednesday’s release of the May consumer price index.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq sinks 3% as tech sell-off reignites
top_signals.summary: Heavy losses for AI-linked stocks overshadow gains across rest of market
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Brussels orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI agents
top_signals.summary: Emergency measures signal EU efforts to intervene over rapidly developing market for autonomous agents
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Airbus plans German-led alliance to replace doomed fighter jet
top_signals.summary: Group of eight companies wants to develop a sixth-generation fighter jet for Europe
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Opening speech by President von der Leyen at the New European Bauhaus Festival 2026

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Commission issues €8 billion in its sixth syndicated transaction of 2026
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 09 Jun 2026 The European Commission has raised €8 billion of EU-Bonds in its 6th syndicated transaction for 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
